functions.name: core_commands.batch.color.color
documentation:
Sets the default console foreground and background colours.
0 = Black - 8 = Gray - 1 = Blue - 9 = Light Blue - 2 = Green - A = Light Green - 3 = Aqua - B = Light Aqua - 4 = Red - C = Light Red - 5 = Purple - D = Light Purple - 6 = Yellow - E = Light Yellow - 7 = White - F = Bright White

functions.name: core_commands.batch.echo.echo
documentation:
Display messages on screen, turn command-echoing on or off.

arguments: ON | OFF | /?

functions.name: core_commands.batch.call.call
documentation: Call one batch program from another, or call a subroutine.

functions.name: core_commands.batch.curl.curl
documentation: Transfer data from or to a server, using one of the supported protocols (HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, FTPS, SCP, SFTP, TFTP, DICT, TELNET, LDAP or FILE).
